testcase.name: allJsonPropertiesShouldHaveApplyFieldCase

failure.message: com/azure/cosmos/benchmark/TenantWorkloadConfig has been compiled by a more recent version of the Java Runtime (class file version 69.0), this version of the Java Runtime only recognizes class file versions up to 61.0
